# tokenRange(at:unit:)

**Instance Method**

Returns the range of the linguistic unit containing the specified character index.

## Declaration

```swift
@nonobjc func tokenRange(at index: String.Index, unit: NLTokenUnit) -> Range<String.Index>
```

## Parameters

- **unit**: The linguistic unit. For possible values, see [doc://com.apple.naturallanguage/documentation/NaturalLanguage/NLTokenUnit].

## Return Value

The range of the substring for the linguistic unit.

## Determining the range of a unit token

- **tokenRange(for:unit:)**: Finds the entire range of all tokens of the specified linguistic unit contained completely or partially within the specified range.
- **NLTokenUnit**: Constants representing linguistic units.
